case_title: BILLUPS, VIVIAN VS MCGRIFF, DAVID CHEH

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MCGRIFF, DAVID CHEH
